TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Huring = Nsgan Huring o gaga Nsgan Skangki, kmpraan kana dxgal o 127.45 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 1.5 km², dxgal pmblxan o 9.08 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 1,855, sapah o 763, seejiq tnpusu 1,120 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 60%(Sbnawan). Sbnawan ka hbaraw balay alang hini. Nyusan qpahan Nsgan Huring o niqan 12 alang ni maxal 6. 6 o, Cingaroan , Cirakayan , Cihafayan , Sariwsiw , Tangahang , Cilo'ohay Pusu pnyahan patas
S.PHON: = ħuɾiŋ = nsgan ħuɾiŋ o gaga nsgan skaŋki, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o *.* km*, dxgal pmblxan o *.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o ***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(sbnawan). sbnawan ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan ħuɾiŋ o niqan ** alaŋ ni maxal *. * o, ʦiŋaɾoan , ʦiɾakajan , ʦiħa*ajan , saɾiwsiw , taŋaħaŋ , ʦilo'oħaj pusu pnjaħan patas
S.FORM: = Huring = Nsgan Huring o gaga Nsgan Skangki, kmpraan kana dxgal o 127.45 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 1.5 km², dxgal pmblxan o 9.08 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 1,855, sapah o 763, seejiq tnpusu 1,120 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 60%(Sbnawan). Sbnawan ka hbaraw balay alang hini. Nyusan qpahan Nsgan Huring o niqan 12 alang ni maxal 6. 6 o, Cingaroan , Cirakayan , Cihafayan , Sariwsiw , Tangahang , Cilo'ohay Pusu pnyahan patas
